root_cause: Scheduler extender failure prevented pod scheduling
evidence: FailedScheduling event references a scheduler extender error
Dominant scheduler message: 0/3 nodes are available: error selecting node using extender "gpu-extender": connection refused.

causes.message: A scheduler extender returned an error during scheduling
The scheduler could not complete node selection because the extender failed
Pod remains Pending because scheduling could not complete

pod:extender-failure-pod: Pod scheduling was blocked by a scheduler extender failure

likely_causes: Scheduler extender service is unavailable or timing out
Scheduler extender returned an internal error
Network connectivity to the extender is broken
suggested_checks: Check kube-scheduler logs for extender errors
Verify scheduler extender service health and connectivity
Review extender timeout and filter configuration
